improvement_bullets: Developed Power BI and Looker dashboards to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%.
Created executive summary decks in PowerPoint for stakeholder meetings, translating complex data findings into actionable business recommendations.
Automated the creation of weekly sales and operations reports by ingesting POS and CRM data, demonstrating strong data validation practices and saving 8 hours per week.
Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, ensuring a consistent 'single source of truth' and reducing report discrepancies, aligning with the need for data validation.

Collaborated with product managers on a 14-person team to align features with business objectives, streamlining the software development workflow and reducing delivery delays by 25%, showcasing collaboration and adaptability.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Planning and Forecasting Intern opportunity with Phibro Animal Health. I am interested in this opportunity because Phibro's commitment to innovation in animal health and nutrition, coupled with its diversified portfolio, presents a unique environment for growth and learning. What interests me about working for Phibro is its approach to developing a diverse workforce that fosters creativity and allows individuals to be successful, excites inspires intrigues me because I thrive in collaborative and supportive environments where I can contribute my skills and learn from experienced professionals.

I believe my strong analytical skills and my proficiency in automation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on efficiency and accuracy. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual reporting, which reduced data mismatches and improved work efficiency by 40%. This resulted in significant time savings and more accurate strategic decisions.

Ultimately, I know that the Planning and Forecasting Intern role at Phibro Animal Health would allow me to bring my expertise in data analysis and automation to building dashboards and creating Excel-based analysis files. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my reporting and documentation skills. I designed Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data validation and automation skills in working on executive summary decks and creating Excel-based analysis files at Phibro Animal Health.

I know that my attention to detail and my ability to learn quickly align with what it takes to succeed at the Planning and Forecasting Intern role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
